title: DCC Global Processing Parameter Values
description: Actual runtime values for data processing parameters. Values-only file - definitions are in dcc_register_base#/definitions/dcc_parameter_entry. Referenced by dcc_register_config.json via $ref.

pending_status.description: Resolved from approval_code_schema approval entry with code 'PEN'. Ensures single source of truth for pending status.

dynamic_column_creation.description: Executed by _initialize_missing_columns. If a schema column is not found in the input data, it is created using the global or column-specific default value.
